home.name: Svetoslav Hristov
home.title: Software Engineer
home.bio: Curious by nature and structured in practice, I turn complex challenges into clear, reliable systems. I work across software development, cloud-native platforms, DevOps, data, and automation.
home.quote: Build with creativity, ship with precision.

about.heroParagraph1: I am a software engineer based in Eindhoven, Netherlands. I enjoy designing practical systems that connect product needs with robust technical execution.
about.heroParagraph2: My work spans backend engineering, serverless cloud platforms, CI/CD, observability, data pipelines, and RPA workflows. I focus on reliability, clarity, and long-term maintainability.

journeyMilestones.title: BAS Studies Started
journeyMilestones.detail: Started Bachelor of Applied Sciences at Fontys University in Eindhoven.

journeyMilestones.title: Software Developer Internship
journeyMilestones.detail: At Genzai and ViaLuxury, built an event-driven data transfer module and supported personalized marketing via unified customer profiles.

journeyMilestones.title: Student Assistant
journeyMilestones.detail: Supported first-semester Fontys ICT students with technical guidance during workshops and assignments.

journeyMilestones.title: Technical Lead
journeyMilestones.detail: At Teamium (Fontys ICT Open-learning), led the transition from proof-of-concept to production-ready architecture and mentored teammates.

journeyMilestones.title: IT Internship at Homed-IQ
journeyMilestones.detail: Designed a proof-of-concept for automated testing, deployment, and monitoring for a serverless backend with stronger observability.

journeyMilestones.title: Developer at Homed-IQ
journeyMilestones.detail: Maintaining and improving AWS Lambda backend services, RPA workflows, monitoring and alerting, and data pipelines for business insights.

passions.title: Serverless Systems
passions.description: Building scalable backend services on AWS Lambda and event-driven patterns.

passions.title: Cloud & DevOps
passions.description: Designing CI/CD pipelines and observability-first deployments for reliable delivery.

passions.title: Data Engineering
passions.description: Designing data flows and dashboards that support practical business decisions.

passions.title: Automation
passions.description: Implementing RPA workflows to streamline repetitive operational processes.

passions.title: System Reliability
passions.description: Improving monitoring, alerting, and operational resilience in production.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.intro: I am open to discussing software engineering roles, backend and cloud projects, and automation initiatives. Feel free to reach out for opportunities or technical collaboration.

availability.title: Currently Available
availability.description: I am open to full-time opportunities, freelance collaborations, and technical discussions. Feel free to reach out - I typically respond within 24 hours.

toasts.missingFieldsDescription: Please fill in all fields before sending.
toasts.invalidEmailDescription: Please enter a valid email address.
toasts.successDescription: Thanks for reaching out. I will get back to you soon.

experiences.description: Maintain and improve a serverless AWS Lambda backend used across core business functions, build RPA workflows, and support monitoring, alerting, and data pipelines.
Designed and implemented a proof-of-concept for automated testing, deployment, and monitoring of a serverless backend with improved observability and CI/CD workflows.
Led technical transition of a proof-of-concept into a production-ready system, mentored teammates, and aligned architecture decisions with stakeholders.
Built an event-driven data transfer module to aggregate user data across platforms and enable personalized, data-driven marketing segmentation.

projects.title: Serverless Backend Operations
projects.summary: Maintenance and improvement of an AWS Lambda backend used across core business functions.
projects.description: A production-focused backend engineering effort at Homed-IQ centered on reliability, maintainability, and operational support in a serverless AWS environment.
features: Maintenance and iterative improvement of serverless backend services
Real-time monitoring and alerting for high availability
Support for data pipelines and business insight dashboards
challenges: Balancing rapid business needs with long-term backend stability
Improving operational visibility across critical workflows
Supporting data consistency across cloud-native components

projects.title: RPA Process Automation
projects.summary: Automated operational workflows to reduce manual effort and improve consistency.
projects.description: Designed and implemented RPA workflows to streamline business operations and increase process reliability.
features: Integrated automation with existing business flows
challenges: Translating manual business steps into robust automation
Ensuring stable execution in changing operational contexts
Aligning technical automation with stakeholder expectations

projects.title: Event-Driven Customer Data Module
projects.summary: Aggregated user data across platforms to enable unified customer profiles.
projects.description: Internship project focused on event-driven data transfer and segmentation support for more effective, personalized marketing.
challenges: Designing reliable data flow between multiple systems
Collaborating with marketing and data teams on outcomes

projects.title: CI/CD and Observability PoC
projects.summary: Proof-of-concept for automated testing, deployment, and monitoring of a serverless backend.
projects.description: Created a practical foundation for production-ready deployment with CI/CD and observability improvements during the Homed-IQ internship.
features: Monitoring pipeline for service health and behavior
Improved visibility into critical business operations
challenges: Designing a PoC that could scale to production expectations
Integrating observability without disrupting delivery speed
Aligning technical quality gates with operational needs
